title: Style run manipulation utilities for text formatting
purpose: Provides functions to manage and manipulate style runs in text content, including applying, removing, and toggling formatting styles like bold, italic, and text decoration.

steps.content: Iterate through the style runs to find the one containing the specified index.
IF the index falls within a run's range, return the style associated with that run.
ELSE return an empty style object.
Initialize an array of null values with length equal to the text length.
For each style run, iterate through its character positions and merge its style with existing styles.
Return the array of character styles.

methods.name: applyStyleToRange
methods.normalized_params: (runs: StyleRun[], start: number, end: number, patch: CharacterStyleOverride, textLength: number): StyleRun[]

steps.content: Expand the existing style runs into individual character styles.
For each character in the specified range, apply the patch style.
Compact the character styles back into style runs.
Return the updated style runs.

methods.name: removeStyleFromRange
methods.normalized_params: (runs: StyleRun[], start: number, end: number, keys: (keyof CharacterStyleOverride)[], textLength: number): StyleRun[]

steps.content: Expand the existing style runs into individual character styles.
For each character in the specified range, remove the specified style keys.
If the resulting style is empty, set it to null.
Compact the character styles back into style runs.
Return the updated style runs.

methods.name: selectionHasStyle
methods.normalized_params: (runs: StyleRun[], start: number, end: number, key: keyof CharacterStyleOverride, value: unknown): boolean

steps.content: Iterate through each character in the specified range.
For each character, retrieve its style and check if the specified key matches the expected value.
IF any character does not match, return false.
ELSE return true.

methods.name: stylesEqual
methods.normalized_params: (a: CharacterStyleOverride | null, b: CharacterStyleOverride | null): boolean

steps.content: IF both styles are identical references, return true.
IF either style is null, return true only if both are null.
Compare the number of keys in both styles.
IF the key counts differ, return false.
For each key in the first style, compare its value with the second style.
IF any key value differs, return false.
ELSE return true.
IF the style is null, return true.
ELSE check if the style has any keys.
IF no keys exist, return true.
ELSE return false.
Initialize an empty result array for style runs.
Iterate through the character styles starting from index 0.
Skip any empty styles.
Record the start index and style of a contiguous group.
Continue until the group ends and create a style run for it.
Return the compacted style runs.

methods.name: adjustRunsForInsert
methods.normalized_params: (runs: StyleRun[], pos: number, insertLength: number): StyleRun[]

steps.content: Map over each existing style run.
IF the insertion position is before the run's start, shift the run's start forward.
IF the insertion position is within the run's range, extend the run's length.
ELSE keep the run unchanged.
Return the adjusted style runs.

methods.name: adjustRunsForDelete
methods.normalized_params: (runs: StyleRun[], start: number, deleteLength: number): StyleRun[]

steps.content: Initialize an empty result array for style runs.
Process each existing style run.
IF the run is entirely before the deletion range, keep it unchanged.
IF the run is entirely after the deletion range, shift its start backward.
IF the run overlaps with the deletion range, calculate the new start and length.
IF the new length is positive, add the adjusted run to the result.
Return the adjusted style runs.

methods.name: toggleBoldInRange
methods.normalized_params: (runs: StyleRun[], start: number, end: number, nodeWeight: number, textLength: number): { runs: StyleRun[]; newWeight: number }

steps.content: Check if the entire selection is already bold.
IF the selection is all bold, remove the bold style from the range.
ELSE apply bold style to the range.
Return the updated runs and the new font weight.

methods.name: selectionAllBold
methods.normalized_params: (runs: StyleRun[], start: number, end: number, nodeWeight: number): boolean

steps.content: Iterate through each character in the specified range.
For each character, retrieve its style and get the font weight.
IF any character's weight is less than 700, return false.
ELSE return true.

methods.name: toggleItalicInRange
methods.normalized_params: (runs: StyleRun[], start: number, end: number, nodeItalic: boolean, textLength: number): { runs: StyleRun[]; newItalic: boolean }

steps.content: Check if the entire selection is already italic.
IF the selection is all italic, remove the italic style from the range.
ELSE apply italic style to the range.
Return the updated runs and the new italic state.

methods.name: selectionAllItalic
methods.normalized_params: (runs: StyleRun[], start: number, end: number, nodeItalic: boolean): boolean

steps.content: Iterate through each character in the specified range.
For each character, retrieve its style and check if it's italic.
IF any character is not italic, return false.
ELSE return true.

methods.name: toggleDecorationInRange
methods.normalized_params: (runs: StyleRun[], start: number, end: number, deco: TextDecoration, nodeDeco: TextDecoration, textLength: number): { runs: StyleRun[]; newDeco: TextDecoration }

steps.content: Check if the entire selection already has the specified decoration.
IF the selection has the decoration, remove it from the range.
ELSE apply the decoration to the range.
Return the updated runs and the new decoration state.

methods.name: selectionAllHasDecoration
methods.normalized_params: (runs: StyleRun[], start: number, end: number, deco: TextDecoration, nodeDeco: TextDecoration): boolean

steps.content: Iterate through each character in the specified range.
For each character, retrieve its style and check if it has the specified decoration.
IF any character does not have the decoration, return false.
ELSE return true.
